def test_json_serialization():
    """Test that the objects serialize to JSON correctly"""
    print("\n=== Testing JSON Serialization ===")
    
    # Create Software object
    software_obj = stix2.v21.Software(
        name="macOS",
        vendor="Apple",
        version="12.0"
    )
    
    # Create Malware with operating_system_refs
    malware = stix2.v21.Malware(
        malware_types=["worm"],
        name="MacWorm",
        is_family=False,
        operating_system_refs=[software_obj.id]

    json_str = str(malware)

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"✗ Round-trip serialization failed: {e}")
